_meta.description: Systematic verification of data sources against sustainability reports
_meta.method: Each data point verified against resources/reports/extracted_text/*.json with verbatim quotes

pcaf_signatory.verbatim: As a member of the PCAF, Nordea... Board of Directors, PCAF Core Team and PCAF Nordic group since 2020

financed_emissions.verbatim: Financed emissions in the lending portfolio reduced by 36% by the end of 2024 compared with the baseline 23.1 MtCO2e... 14.8 [MtCO2e current]
financed_emissions.note: Lending: 14.8 MtCO2e. Investments (NAM+NLP): ~9.1 MtCO2e. Total Cat 15: ~23.9 MtCO2e.

financed_unit.verbatim: tCO2e / MtCO2e explicitly stated throughout report

part_a_status.verbatim: Detailed PCAF tables for business loans, mortgages, commercial RE, motor vehicles, sovereign debt

part_b_status.verdict: ERROR — Part B not yet implemented
part_b_status.verbatim: committed to reporting facilitated emissions according to Part B of the PCAF Standard in the future

dqs.verbatim: Business loans DQ score 4.1, motor vehicles 3.4, residential RE 3.6, commercial RE 3.9
dqs.note: Weighted average approximately 3.8. Current value of 4 is a rough approximation.

sovereign_debt.verdict: ERROR — ext_coverage says 'reported' but compliance says 'partial'
sovereign_debt.verbatim: For the first time Nordea reports sovereign debt financed emissions for the NAM, NLP and Group Treasury portfolios

listed_equity_corporate_bonds.note: NAM reports investment portfolio emissions but no specific listed equity breakout

business_loans_unlisted_equity.verbatim: Business loans financed emissions table on page 164

project_finance.verbatim: project finance PCAF asset class is embedded in Nordea's business loans

commercial_real_estate.verbatim: Commercial real estate financed emissions table

residential_mortgages.verbatim: Residential real estate corresponds to PCAF mortgages asset class

sovereign_debt.verbatim: Nordea reports sovereign debt financed emissions

NORDEA.summary: financed_emissions (null→14.8Mt), financed_unit (unknown→MtCO2e), part_b_status (partial→missing), sovereign_debt in compliance (partial→reported)

pcaf_mentioned.verbatim: PCAF standard for carbon disclosure by financial institutions

pcaf_signatory.verbatim: Commerzbank has joined the Partnership for Carbon Accounting Financials (PCAF)

financed_emissions.verbatim: total volume of financed emissions amounts to approximately... Business loans 20.2 Mt + Listed equity 2.8 Mt + others
financed_emissions.note: Owned S1&S2: Listed equity 2.8Mt + Business loans 20.2Mt + Project finance + Mortgages + Motor + Commercial RE + Sovereign = ~23Mt total

part_a_status.verbatim: Owned financed emissions (disaggregated by PCAF asset class) table with all 7 asset classes

part_b_status.verbatim: No mention of facilitated emissions or Part B in the report

dqs.verdict: MAJOR ERROR — DQS 1 would mean best quality, actual is 3.4-4.6
dqs.verbatim: Listed equity DQS 3.9, Business loans DQS 4.5, Managed listed DQS 3.4
dqs.note: DQS=1 in the data means best quality which is completely wrong. Weighted average ~4.05. Note: for client-verified scores this is overridden to score 3, but the underlying data is still wrong.

sovereign_debt.verbatim: Sovereign debt (owned and managed financed emissions) in PCAF table

listed_equity_corporate_bonds.verbatim: Listed equity and corporate bonds 34,230.0 Mio€ in PCAF table

business_loans_unlisted_equity.verbatim: Business loans and unlisted equity 85,190.0 Mio€

project_finance.verbatim: Project finance Power generation in PCAF table with emissions

COMMERZBANK.summary: financed_emissions (null→~23Mt), financed_unit (unknown→MtCO2e), part_a_status (partial→reported), part_b_status (partial→missing), dqs (1→~4.05 MAJOR), sovereign_debt (partial→reported), listed_equity (partial→reported), project_finance (partial→reported)

pcaf_signatory.verdict: NEEDS VERIFICATION — no explicit membership found
pcaf_signatory.verbatim: Uses PCAF methodology but no explicit 'member of PCAF' or 'signatory' statement found
pcaf_signatory.note: The report mentions applying PCAF standards but not membership. Needs external verification (pcaf website).

financed_emissions.verbatim: émissions absolues (périmètre 1&2) pour ce portefeuille plus large sont de 1 million tCO2e + obligations souveraines 3.7 millions tCO2e

part_a_status.note: Expanded scope in 2024 adding sovereign bonds, but not all asset classes covered

part_c_status.verbatim: Ageas a appliqué les standards du PCAF pour les activités d'assurance

dqs.verbatim: score PCAF de 5 a été obtenu (proxy-based estimates)

sovereign_debt.verbatim: Ageas a élargi la portée de sa mesure en ajoutant... les obligations souveraines

AGEAS.summary: financed_emissions (null→~4.7Mt), financed_unit (unknown→MtCO2e), dqs (null→5), sovereign_debt (missing→partial), pcaf_signatory (needs external verification)

critical_errors: COMMERZBANK dqs=1 (should be ~4.05) — would give score 5 instead of 2
All 3 institutions: financed_emissions=null when values ARE in the reports
COMMERZBANK part_a_status=partial when it should be reported (full PCAF tables)
GLOBAL_SUMMARY.pattern: Most errors are null/missing values where data actually exists in the reports, or incorrect status flags (partial vs reported vs missing)
